mapper.select: SELECT id, database_id AS databaseId, collected_at AS collectedAt, created_at AS createdAt, backend_pid AS backendPid, blocker_xmin_horizon AS blockerXminHorizon, tuples_deleted AS tuplesDeleted, elapsed_seconds AS elapsedSeconds FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE (#{databaseId} IS NULL OR database_id = #{databaseId}) AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC

SELECT id, database_id AS databaseId, collected_at AS collectedAt, blocker_xmin_horizon AS blockerXminHorizon, tuples_deleted AS tuplesDeleted, elapsed_seconds AS elapsedSeconds FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE (#{databaseId} IS NULL OR database_id = #{databaseId}) AND collected_at >= #{since} ORDER BY collected_at DESC

SELECT id, database_id AS databaseId, collected_at AS collectedAt, blocker_xmin_horizon AS blockerXminHorizon FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE (#{databaseId} IS NULL OR database_id = #{databaseId}) AND blocker_xmin_horizon IS NOT NULL ORDER BY collected_at DESC

SELECT id, database_id AS databaseId, n_dead_tup AS nDeadTup, n_live_tup AS nLiveTup FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE (#{databaseId} IS NULL OR database_id = #{databaseId}) AND n_dead_tup > #{threshold} ORDER BY n_dead_tup DESC

SELECT id, database_id AS databaseId, collected_at AS collectedAt, bloat_bytes AS bloatBytes, bloat_ratio AS bloatRatio FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE (#{databaseId} IS NULL OR database_id = #{databaseId}) AND collected_at >= #{startDate} ORDER BY collected_at ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN bloat_ratio < 0.05 THEN '0-5%' WHEN bloat_ratio < 0.10 THEN '5-10%' WHEN bloat_ratio < 0.15 THEN '10-15%' WHEN bloat_ratio < 0.20 THEN '15-20%' WHEN bloat_ratio < 0.30 THEN '20-30%' ELSE '30%+' END as range, COUNT(*) as count FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE (#{databaseId} IS NULL OR database_id = #{databaseId}) AND collected_at >= #{since} GROUP BY range ORDER BY MIN(bloat_ratio)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bloat_bytes), 0) FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE (#{databaseId} IS NULL OR database_id = #{databaseId}) AND collected_at >= #{since}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE (#{databaseId} IS NULL OR database_id = #{databaseId}) AND bloat_ratio >= 0.15 AND collected_at >= #{since}

SELECT id, database_id AS databaseId, collected_at AS collectedAt, bloat_bytes AS bloatBytes, bloat_ratio AS bloatRatio FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE (#{databaseId} IS NULL OR database_id = #{databaseId}) AND collected_at >= #{startDate} ORDER BY collected_at ASC

SELECT id, database_id AS databaseId, wraparound_progress_pct AS wraparoundProgressPct FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE (#{databaseId} IS NULL OR database_id = #{databaseId}) AND wraparound_progress_pct > #{threshold} ORDER BY wraparound_progress_pct DESC

WITH latest AS ( SELECT database_id, MAX(collected_at) as max_collected_at FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE (#{databaseId} IS NULL OR database_id = #{databaseId}) GROUP BY database_id ) SELECT v.id, v.database_id AS databaseId, v.collected_at AS collectedAt, v.bloat_bytes AS bloatBytes, v.bloat_ratio AS bloatRatio FROM vacuum_trend_metrics v INNER JOIN latest ON v.database_id = latest.database_id AND v.collected_at = latest.max_collected_at
